label: Ritual visual effect comp properties
description: Base schema for visual effect comp property objects used by RitualVisualEffectDef. Subclass is selected by the Class attribute.

compClass.label: Comp class
compClass.description: C# RitualVisualEffectComp subclass instantiated at runtime by this properties object.

moteDef.label: Mote def
moteDef.description: ThingDef (mote) spawned by this visual effect comp.

fleckDef.label: Fleck def
fleckDef.description: FleckDef spawned by this visual effect comp.

effecterDef.label: Effecter def
effecterDef.description: EffecterDef spawned by this visual effect comp.

velocity.label: Velocity
velocity.description: FloatRange controlling random velocity magnitude for spawned effects.

rotation.label: Rotation
rotation.description: FloatRange controlling random initial rotation of spawned effects.

rotationRate.label: Rotation rate
rotationRate.description: FloatRange controlling random rotation rate of spawned effects.

scale.label: Scale
scale.description: FloatRange controlling random scale of spawned effects. Defaults to 1~1.

offset.label: Offset
offset.description: Vector3 positional offset applied to spawned effects.

roomCheckOffset.label: Room check offset
roomCheckOffset.description: IntVec3 offset from the spawn position used when checking room membership.

scaleWithRoom.label: Scale with room
scaleWithRoom.description: If true, the effect scale is multiplied by the room size.

scalePositionWithRoom.label: Scale position with room
scalePositionWithRoom.description: If true, the spawn position offset is scaled by the room size.

onlySpawnInSameRoom.label: Only spawn in same room
onlySpawnInSameRoom.description: If true, this comp only spawns effects inside the same room as the ritual target.

colorOverride.label: Color override
colorOverride.description: Optional color that overrides the tint color from the parent RitualVisualEffectDef.

overrideColors.label: Override colors
overrideColors.description: List of colors randomly chosen as the tint for each spawned effect.
